## Summary

<!-- What changes, and why is it needed? -->

## Security and compatibility

- [ ] Client input is treated as untrusted and revalidated on the server.
- [ ] Public exports, events, configuration, and migrations are documented.
- [ ] No code or assets were copied from another framework without compatible attribution.
- [ ] Existing server data has a forward-only migration path, or no schema changes are made.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] FiveM/Cfx integration steps are described when local automation cannot cover them.

<!-- Add exact manual checks, screenshots, or logs as appropriate. -->
